description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped storage box made of blue plastic, featuring a sturdy, reinforced frame with grid-like ribbing along the sides for added structural strength. The box has a deep interior cavity, suitable for holding a variety of items, and the walls are solid with no visible perforations or openings. The exterior surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, and the color is a uniform medium blue throughout. There are no visible handles, lids, or locking mechanisms, but there is a flat, rectangular area on the front that could serve as a label or identification panel. The overall design suggests it is intended for stacking or organizing items in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or storage rooms.
description: A blue, open-topped plastic storage box with reinforced grid sides and a flat label area on the front. It has a sturdy, matte finish and no visible handles or lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, deep interior, and a flat rectangular label area centered on the front wall.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the grid-like ribbing along the length of the box and the solid, uninterrupted side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front but without the label area, showing the open top and deep cavity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with grid ribbing and a solid side wall.
